name: Parmesan and Walnut Bruschetta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broiler.
2. Grate the Parmesan cheese.
3. Combine half a cup of cheese, half a cup of chopped walnuts, and salt in a food processor. Process until finely chopped.
4. Add three-quarters of a cup of olive oil to the food processor and process until fairly smooth.
5. Cut bread diagonally into 24 slices about one inch thick.
6. Brush both sides of each slice with remaining half a cup of olive oil.
7. Toast bread on a baking sheet under the broiler for about 30 seconds per side.
8. Remove from oven and spread one side of each slice with walnut cheese mixture.
9. Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
10. Press additional walnuts on top.
11. Broil until cheese begins to melt, about 30 seconds.
12. Serve immediately.
Note: These delicious hot hors d'oeuvres are perfect with a glass of red wine before dinner or as a special bread alongside a bowl of soup. They make 24 servings.
